info.name: Nyay Vani API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Nyay Vani — Legal & Medical AI Assistant

## Setup
1. Set BASE_URL variable to http://localhost:8000
2. Run 'Create Legal Session' first to get a session_id
3. Copy session_id into the SESSION_ID variable
4. Run chat tests in order

## Flow
Health Check → Create Session → Chat (intake phase) → Chat (expert phase) → Submit Lead

request.description: Root endpoint — confirms app is running

Full system health — Ollama, ChromaDB, Database, System metrics (RAM, CPU)

Expected: All services connected, both models ready
Interactive Swagger UI — all endpoints documented

Creates new legal session.

✅ Auto-saves session_id to SESSION_ID variable

Expected response:
- session_id: uuid string
- tab_type: legal
- agent_phase: intake
- confidence_score: 0

Returns full session including all messages, metadata, confidence score.

Use after chatting to see how metadata is building up.
AI-generated summary of session — used for lead form submission
Deletes session and all its messages. Use for 'New Session' button.

⚠️ SSE STREAMING ENDPOINT

Postman shows raw SSE events. Each line starting with 'data:' is one event.

Event types you'll see:
- routing: which model was selected (E2B or E4B) and why
- metrics: RAM used, CPU — compute display
- token: each word of response (streaming)
- metadata_update: new info extracted, confidence score updated
- phase_change: intake → expert transition
- emergency: if distress detected
- done: full response complete

This first message should route to INTAKE agent (E2B)
Agent will ask ONE follow-up question about location/religion/urgency

Second intake message providing location and religion.

Watch confidence_score increase in metadata_update events.
Should still be in intake phase — asking more questions.

item.name: Legal Chat — Intake Message 3 (Urgency + Prior Action)

request.description:
Provides urgency and prior action info.

At this point confidence should be >= 14.
Watch for phase_change event: intake → expert
Next response will come from EXPERT agent (E4B + RAG)

item.name: Legal Chat — Expert Response (Full Legal Guidance)

request.description:
Confirmation message — triggers Expert Agent (E4B) with RAG.

Watch for:
- citations event: which laws were retrieved from ChromaDB
- token events: expert response streaming in
- done event: full response with citations

Response should include:
1. Empathy line
2. Specific rights (DV Act sections)
3. Immediate steps
4. Documents needed
5. Free help available
6. Offer to connect with lawyer
Property rights usecase — tests Hindu Succession Act RAG retrieval

⚠️ EMERGENCY TEST

Should immediately return:
- type: emergency
- Emergency UI data with 181, 100 helpline numbers
- NO LLM invocation (instant response)

Verify emergency flag is set in session after this.

Pregnancy danger signs — should trigger high urgency intake questions

Note: Swelling + headache at 7 months = pre-eclampsia warning sign
Watch if emergency is triggered or intake continues
Mental health usecase — should respond with empathy first, then PHQ screening questions, then iCall helpline

⚠️ MEDICAL EMERGENCY TEST

Child + fits + unconscious = critical emergency
Should immediately return 108 ambulance prompt
NO LLM invoked — instant emergency response
Lists all available Indian language female voices

⬇️ Returns MP3 audio binary

In Postman: response shows as audio binary
Save response to file and play to hear Swara voice

Voice: hi-IN-SwaraNeural (warm, natural Indian female)

formdata.description: Optional: hint language code (hi, ta, te, bn, mr)

request.description:
Upload an audio file to transcribe.

How to test:
1. Record yourself saying something in Hindi
2. Save as .wav or .mp3
3. Select the file in audio_file field
4. Send

Returns: text, language_detected, confidence, duration_seconds

Submit request for free lawyer callback.

Note: session_id auto-attaches conversation summary to lead.
Lawyer will call back within 2-4 hours.

Returns: lead_id, message, helpline numbers

body.raw:
{
  "session_id": "{{MEDICAL_SESSION_ID}}",
  "name": "Sunita",
  "phone": "9876543211",
  "district": "Varanasi",
  "state": "Uttar Pradesh",
  "symptom_summary": "7 month pregnancy, swelling in legs, severe headache",
  "red_flag_detected": true
}
